case_title: SHULMAN, ZINAIDA et al vs. STUART, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHULMAN, ZINAIDA SHULMAN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT STUART, STEVE GARZA, SAM DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS GRAZA, SAM TO BE GARZA, SAM
